about.title: About Kuma
about.kuroDescription: SDM primer batch design tool with Tm-guided overlap extension.
about.mameSummary: Desktop verdict analysis tool for NB-plate mutagenesis runs.
about.mameBuiltWith: Built with Tauri + React + Python sidecar.
about.licenseText: Internal use, KRIBB C1 Lab - DOI/citation forthcoming
about.thirdPartyLicensesDesc: Open-source components bundled with this application.
about.licensesNotBundled: Third-party licenses available in distribution package.
about.mameNoExternalServices: MAME does not use external network services. All analysis runs locally.
about.diagnosticsNote: Saves a JSON bundle (app info + crash log) to a location you choose. No user data or sequences are included.

settings.title: Settings
settings.colorblindModeDesc: Adds shape markers to status indicators so colors are not the only differentiator.
settings.notificationsNote: Fired for jobs lasting longer than 5 minutes.
settings.sleepPrevention: Sleep prevention: enabled while jobs run.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.subtitle: Thresholds and ingest mode for this batch.
parameters.targetAmpliconLengthHelp: Expected amplicon length after barcode sorting. Leave blank to auto-detect from sample reads; set manually when the distribution is noisy.
parameters.targetAmpliconLengthAriaLabel: Target amplicon length in bp; leave blank to auto-detect
parameters.lengthToleranceHelp: Allowed window around target amplicon length. Reads outside target ± tolerance are filtered when length filtering is active.
parameters.minQscoreHelp: Minimum per-read qscore threshold when sequencing_summary metadata is available.
parameters.minBarcodeScoreHelp: Minimum MinKNOW barcode_score threshold when sequencing_summary metadata is available.
parameters.trimAdaptersHelp: Optionally trims the forward barcode and universal reverse primer from assigned reads before downstream FASTA output.
parameters.universalRevPrimerHelp: Universal reverse primer sequence in 5′ to 3′ orientation. Used only when Trim Adapters is enabled.
parameters.normalizeHeadersHelp: Writes the well name into FASTA headers instead of preserving ONT read IDs. This makes downstream per-well parsing more consistent.
parameters.rawRunOptionsAriaLabel: Raw run demux and filter options
parameters.barcodeRunsAutomatically: Barcode sorting runs automatically when you press the main Run button.
parameters.cdsStartHelp: 0-based CDS start offset used when translating consensus sequence to amino acids.
parameters.cdsEndHelp: CDS end coordinate used for translation. Must match the reference FASTA frame.
parameters.manyCutoffHelp: Number of observed amino-acid changes above which a result is classified as MANY.

barcodeSetup.title: Barcode Package Setup
barcodeSetup.subtitle: Generate a MAME barcode package from a CDS FASTA and barcode seed file.
barcodeSetup.cdsFastaHelper: Reference CDS sequence (FASTA, GenBank, or SnapGene .dna). gene_start / gene_end are 0-based indices into this sequence.
barcodeSetup.toastSuccessDescWithLength: Amplicon length: {{length}} bp. Files saved to design/
barcodeSetup.geneEndError: gene_end must be greater than gene_start.
barcodeSetup.noProjectWarning: A project must be open to generate a package. Select Open Project from the File menu.
barcodeSetup.barcodeSeedsXlsxHelper: xlsx file containing fwd_1..12 and rev_1..8 seed sequences.

activity.title: Activity data
activity.subtitle: Enter this phase once wet-lab activity measurements are ready (typically days to weeks after Phase 1 Barcode Setup and Phase 2 Analyze). Load measurements, merge with genotype, then export the EVOLVEpro training input.

ingest.uploadDesc: Load a long-format CSV / Excel file (well, replicate, value columns) into the current Round.
ingest.wtDesc: Designate the wild-type wells used for normalisation. Must be set before Merge.

merge.heading: Merge activity with genotype
merge.desc: Join uploaded activity with the Round genotype and normalise by WT.
merge.btnEvolveproAria: Run v0.3 RPC: replicate merge + label-swap guard
merge.v3Note: v0.3: label-swap guard + replicate merge integrated. The 5/12 demo path uses the legacy button.

export.heading: Export EVOLVEpro xlsx
export.desc: Save the merged table as an EVOLVEpro training input xlsx (strict 2-column [Variant, activity], 89W short notation).

exportBlocked.title: Export blocked — label-swap detected
exportBlocked.body: Compare with the previous round's EVOLVEpro result and verify the label mapping for variants that share an activity value.

runHealth.noMinKnow: MinKNOW raw run directory not detected. Pore yield, throughput, and barcode charts are unavailable.
runHealth.figureVerdictBreakdownCaption: Stacked bar showing PASS, Ambiguous, Fail, and Fallback counts per plate.
runHealth.figureFileSizeCaptionBase: 7-bucket file size histogram. Suggested cutoff at {{cutoffKb}} KB using {{method}} method.
runHealth.figureFileSizeCaptionBimodal: 7-bucket file size histogram. Suggested cutoff at {{cutoffKb}} KB using {{method}} method. Bimodal distribution detected.
runHealth.fileSizeAriaLabel: File size distribution histogram. Suggested cutoff: {{cutoffKb}} KB ({{method}})
runHealth.fileSizeAriaLabelBimodal: File size distribution histogram. Suggested cutoff: {{cutoffKb}} KB ({{method}}), bimodal distribution detected
runHealth.figureBarcodeCaption: Horizontal bar chart showing read counts for each detected barcode.
runHealth.figureThroughputCaption: Line chart showing reads per second from experiment start to {{maxTime}} hours.

verdictTable.emptyDesc: Run analysis to populate the verdict table.
verdictTable.noMatchDesc: No results match the current search or filter.

parameterPanel.title: Parameters
parameterPanel.strategyHint_partial: Forward and reverse are independent with overlap upstream of the codon.
parameterPanel.strategyHint_full: Reverse = rc(forward). Single primer Tm and length apply to both.
parameterPanel.strategyHelp:
Partial (Gibson): overlap upstream of the codon; fwd and rev are independent.
Full (Q5 SDM): rev = rc(fwd); single primer covers the mutation.
parameterPanel.strategyOption_partial_title: Gibson assembly style. Forward and reverse primers are independent; overlap is placed upstream of the target codon. Standard for in-house SDM.
parameterPanel.strategyOption_full_title: NEB Q5 SDM kit style. Reverse primer = reverse-complement of forward; a single back-to-back primer pair covers the mutation site.
parameterPanel.polymeraseHelp:
Selects Tm calculation preset (extension Tm target + tolerance defaults).
Choose the polymerase used in your SDM reaction.
Use 'Custom Polymerase' to define your own extension Tm.
parameterPanel.codonHelp:
Min. changes: fewest nucleotide changes from wild-type codon (minimises synthesis cost).
Optimal: highest-frequency codon for the selected organism (maximises expression).
parameterPanel.codonOption_closest: Min. changes (fewest nt changes from WT)
parameterPanel.codonOption_closest_title: Pick the mutant codon with the fewest nucleotide changes from the wild-type codon. Minimises primer mismatch and synthesis cost.
parameterPanel.codonOption_optimal_title: Pick the highest-frequency codon for the selected organism's codon usage table. Maximises expression but may require more nt changes.
parameterPanel.mutationsHelp:
Maximum number of primer designs to generate.
For EVOLVEpro / multi-evolve mode: capped by the CSV variant count.
One 96-well plate fits 95 mutants + 1 WT control.
parameterPanel.tmPrimerTitle: Single Tm target. rev = rc(fwd), so both primers share Tm by construction.
parameterPanel.tmTolHelp: Allowed deviation from Tm targets. Cascade stages add delta on top. Recommended 2-5°C.
parameterPanel.gcHelp:
Recommended range: 40–60%.
Primers outside this range receive a penalty score.
Very low GC (<30%) or very high GC (>70%) reduces synthesis quality.
parameterPanel.gcRangeTitle: Recommended range: 40-60%. Primers outside this range receive a penalty.
parameterPanel.gcInvalidError: Min must be less than Max
parameterPanel.primerLenHelp:
KOD One PCR Master Mix
  Standard:     22–35 bp, Tm >63°C
  Long targets: 25–35 bp, Tm >65°C

Experimental (IspS SDM, n=165)
  Forward total: 19–38 bp (incl. overlap)
  Reverse total: 18–32 bp (incl. overlap)

KURO primer length = overlap + priming region
parameterPanel.primerLenSingleTitle: Single length range applies to both primers (rev = rc(fwd)).
parameterPanel.primerLenInvalidError: Min must be less than Max
parameterPanel.autoRescueTitle: When enabled, retries failed mutations through 4 (top-N) or 6 (pipeline) stages of relaxed parameters. When disabled, failed mutations remain as-is with no auto-retry.
parameterPanel.seedTitle: Optional integer seed. Will be passed to the backend and recorded in run manifests once manifest wiring is complete (backend integration pending).

diversitySections.linkerHelp: Choose whether non-domain residues only backfill spare slots, get their own quota bin, or are excluded from Step 2 entirely.
diversitySections.helpTip3D: Selects variants spread apart in 3D space using AlphaFold Cα coordinates.
diversitySections.helpTip1D: Greedy Pareto selection that maximises minimum sequence-distance between chosen positions.
diversitySections.roundHelp:
Round × size = cumulative data points used to estimate model quality (ρ).
Lower ρ → wider pool and higher entropy weight for exploration.
diversitySections.positionCapHelp: Max substitutions per residue. Cap=1 keeps one best variant per position. Uses Grantham-distance tie-break when scores are within 2%.
diversitySections.domainStrategyHelp: Proportional: quota proportional to domain length. Equal: same quota per domain.
diversitySections.distanceHelp: Auto uses AlphaFold Cα when structure is loaded. Force 1D/3D for controlled comparisons.
diversitySections.poolKTitle: Manual pool size override (ignored when Round > 0)
diversitySections.poolKHelp:
Manual pool multiplier. Ignored when EVOLVEpro Round ≥ 1 (σ-adaptive mode).
Auto K = {{autoK}} based on current round.
diversitySections.entropyGuidedHelp: Positions where EVOLVEpro scores multiple substitutions similarly get an uncertainty bonus. Auto weight = {{autoEntropy}} based on current round.
diversitySections.entropyWeightTitle: Manual entropy weight override (ignored when Round > 0)
diversitySections.randomSeedHelp: Leave blank for fresh randomness. Set a seed to reproduce random baseline comparisons exactly.

candidatePopover.backendUnavailable: Backend alternatives are unavailable until you re-design this workspace. Manual primer evaluation still works.
candidatePopover.rankedByPenalty: Ranked by penalty (lower = better). #1 is auto-selected as default.
candidatePopover.colPenTitle: Penalty = Tm deviation + GC deviation + codon changes + hairpin/homodimer

manifestDiff.title: Compare run manifests
manifestDiff.descriptionChanged: {{count}} item(s) differ between the two manifests.

failedMutationPopover.suggestionTip: Suggestion uses median Tm ({{tmFwd}}/{{tmRev}}/{{tmOv}}°C) and observed GC/length ranges from {{count}} successful primers, with tol ±{{tolMax}}°C.
failedMutationPopover.errorNoCandidates: No candidates found with these parameters

logPanel.titleTooltip: Sidecar progress log. Drag to move.
logPanel.copyAriaLabel: Copy all log messages to clipboard

reRunManifest.title: Confirm re-run
reRunManifest.description: Reproduce the same job from the saved manifest.
reRunManifest.warningBody: Identical output is not guaranteed. Do you want to continue?
reRunManifest.exportOnlyNotice: This manifest is an export-only operation and cannot be re-run directly. Re-export from the original data.

polymeraseEditor.title: Custom Polymerase
polymeraseEditor.description: Primer design defaults and asymmetric Tm targets for KURO.
polymeraseEditor.tmMethodOption_santalucia_title: SantaLucia 1998 nearest-neighbour parameters. Modern default; accurate for most PCR primers (DNA/DNA, 25-mers, physiological salt).
polymeraseEditor.tmMethodOption_breslauer_title: Breslauer 1986 nearest-neighbour parameters. Legacy table; tends to overestimate Tm vs SantaLucia by 1-3 °C.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_owczarzy_title: Owczarzy 2004/2008 monovalent + Mg²⁺ correction. Recommended when Mg²⁺ or dNTP concentrations are non-standard.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_santalucia_title: SantaLucia 1996 monovalent-only correction. Suitable for standard buffers without Mg²⁺ adjustment.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_schildkraut_title: Schildkraut-Lifson 1965 empirical Na⁺ correction. Legacy; coarser than Owczarzy or SantaLucia.
